stemHtml: You are flying a CAT III approach over a bird sanctuary. Which statement is correct in this scenario?

options.a: After a bird strike, there are not only costs of aircraft repair but also costs of aircraft staying on ground.
options.b: If the bird strike caused little damage there's no need to file a Bird Strike Report.
options.c: After bird strike you should continue to your destination airport.
options.d: You should fly faster to minimise the damage.
